ham.subject: Out of Office – Rahul Sharma (12 Apr – 3 May)
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Just a quick note to let you know that I will be out of the office from 12th April to 3rd May for a business trip to Bangalore. I will have limited access to emails during this period.

For any urgent matters, please reach out to Maya Patel at maya.patel@company.com or call her directly at 9876543210.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best,
Rahul Sharma

spam.subject: Congratulations! You have been selected for the XYZ University Scholarship
spam.body:
Dear Student,

Aapko badhai ho! We are pleased to inform you that you have been selected for the prestigious XYZ University Scholarship. This scholarship is awarded to a select group of students each year, and you have been chosen from a pool of over 10,000 applicants.

To claim your scholarship, we need you to verify your details and submit the required documents within 48 hours. Please send the following:
- Copy of your Aadhar card (front and back)
- Recent bank statement
- Passport size photograph

Click <URL> to upload your documents. This step is mandatory to avoid any delay in processing.

Please note that if you do not respond within the specified time frame, your scholarship offer will be automatically revoked, and you will lose the chance to secure this funding.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,
Admissions Office
XYZ University
